title: verbascum × muglense
intro: Verbascum × munzense, also known as the California mullein or giant mullein, is a hybrid perennial plant species in the figwort family, native to the western United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved respiratory health, and antimicrobial effects. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × munzense have been traditionally used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations, relieve coughs, and treat wounds. Further research is needed to confirm the full range of health benefits and optimal uses of this plant, but its traditional applications have been valued for generations in folk medicine.
